sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_REALTIME_NOTIFICATION (NOTISEQ, USERID, MAINTYPE, SUBTYPE, NOTICONTENT, SENDERID, SENDERNAME, REGDATE, ETCDATA, LINKURL, LINKURL_MOBILE, VIEWTYPE, VIEWWIDTH, VIEWHEIGHT, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID) VALUES ((SELECT NVL(MAX(NOTISEQ) + 1, 1) FROM TBL_REALTIME_NOTIFICATION), #recipientId#, #mainType#, #subType#, #notiContent#, #senderId#, #senderName#, TO_DATE(#regDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #etcData#, #linkUrl#, #linkUrlMobile#, #viewType#, #viewWidth#, #viewHeight#, #tenantId#, #companyId#)
sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_REALTIME_NOTIFICATION WHERE USERID = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANYID = #companyId# AND ISDELETE = 'N'
AND ISREAD = 'N'
sqlMap.update:
UPDATE TBL_REALTIME_NOTIFICATION SET
ISREAD = 'Y', READDATE = TO_DATE(#processDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
ISDELETE = 'Y', DELETEDATE = TO_DATE(#processDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
WHERE NOTISEQ = #notiSeq# AND COMPANYID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

UPDATE TBL_REALTIME_NOTIFICATION SET
ISREAD = 'Y', READDATE = TO_DATE(#processDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
ISDELETE = 'Y', DELETEDATE = TO_DATE(#processDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
WHERE USERID = #userId#
AND ISREAD = 'Y'
AND COMPANYID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT * FROM TBL_REALTIME_NOTIFICATION WHERE USERID = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANYID = #companyId# AND ISDELETE = 'N'
AND
REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(NOTICONTENT, '&', '&'), '<', '<'), '>', '>'), '''', '''), '\"' ,'"') LIKE '%' || #keyWord# || '%'
AND MAINTYPE IN
#notiFilterList[]#
AND MAINTYPE IN ('')
) A
WHERE ISREAD = 'N'

SELECT * FROM (SELECT A.*, ROWNUM AS RNUM FROM (SELECT NOTISEQ AS notiSeq, USERID AS userId, MAINTYPE AS mainType, SUBTYPE AS subType, NOTICONTENT AS notiContent, SENDERID AS senderId, SENDERNAME AS senderName, REGDATE + #offSet# / (24 * 60) AS regDate, ISREAD AS isRead, CASE WHEN READDATE IS NULL THEN READDATE ELSE READDATE + #offSet# / (24 * 60) END AS readDate, ETCDATA AS etcData, ISDELETE AS isDelete, DELETEDATE AS deleteDate, LINKURL AS linkUrl, LINKURL_MOBILE AS linkUrlMobile, VIEWTYPE AS viewType, VIEWWIDTH AS viewWidth, VIEWHEIGHT AS viewHeight, TENANT_ID AS tenantId, COMPANYID AS companyId FROM TBL_REALTIME_NOTIFICATION WHERE USERID = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANYID = #companyId# AND ISDELETE = 'N'
AND
REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(NOTICONTENT, '&', '&'), '<', '<'), '>', '>'), '''', '''), '\"' ,'"') LIKE '%' || #keyWord# || '%'
AND MAINTYPE IN
#notiFilterList[]#
AND MAINTYPE IN ('')
AND ISREAD = #isRead#
AND notiseq < #lastNotiSeq#
ORDER BY REGDATE DESC, NOTISEQ DESC ) A
WHERE ROWNUM <= #rowCount# ) WHERE RNUM >= 1

SELECT * FROM (SELECT NOTISEQ AS notiSeq, USERID AS userId, MAINTYPE AS mainType, SUBTYPE AS subType, NOTICONTENT AS notiContent, SENDERID AS senderId, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN U.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE U.DISPLAYNAME END AS senderName, REGDATE + #offSet# / (24 * 60) AS regDate, ISREAD AS isRead, CASE WHEN READDATE IS NULL THEN READDATE ELSE READDATE + #offSet# / (24 * 60) END AS readDate, ETCDATA AS etcData, ISDELETE AS isDelete, DELETEDATE AS deleteDate, LINKURL AS linkUrl, LINKURL_MOBILE AS linkUrlMobile, VIEWTYPE AS viewType, VIEWWIDTH AS viewWidth, VIEWHEIGHT AS viewHeight, N.TENANT_ID AS tenantId, COMPANYID AS companyId FROM TBL_REALTIME_NOTIFICATION N INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER U ON N.SENDERID = U.CN AND N.TENANT_ID = U.TENANT_ID WHERE USERID = #userId# AND N.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANYID = #companyId# AND ISDELETE = 'N'
AND
REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(NOTICONTENT, '&', '&'), '<', '<'), '>', '>'), '''', '''), '\"' ,'"') LIKE '%' || #keyWord# || '%'
AND MAINTYPE IN
#notiFilterList[]#
AND MAINTYPE IN ('')
AND ISREAD = #isRead#
AND notiseq < #lastNotiSeq#
ORDER BY REGDATE DESC, NOTISEQ DESC )
WHERE ROWNUM <= #rowCount#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_TENANT_CONFIG SET PROPERTY_VALUE=#storagePeriod# WHERE PROPERTY_NAME='notiStoragePeriod' AND TENANT_ID=#tenantId#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_REALTIME_NOTIFICATION WHERE (TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offSet# / (24 * 60)) - (TO_DATE(REGDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offSet# / (24 * 60)) > #notiStoragePeriod# AND TENANT_ID=#tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_REALTIME_NOTIFICATION WHERE USERID = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANYID = #companyId# AND REGDATE > TO_DATE(#pollStime#,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') and REGDATE <= TO_DATE(#pollEtime#,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')

SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU TPM INNER JOIN TBL_PORTAL_MENU_COMP TPMC ON TPM.MENU_ID = TPMC.MENU_ID AND TPM.MENUCODE = 'approval' AND TPMC.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TPMC.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND TPM.MENU_URL = '/ezApprovalG/apprGMain.do' AND TPMC.MENU_USED = '1'

(SELECT T1.PERMISSION_CODE as permissionCode, T1.CN as cn, T2.DISPLAYNAME as displayName, T2.DISPLAYNAME2 as displayName2, T1.USER_TYPE as userType, T1.COMPANY_ID as companyId, T1.TENANT_ID as tenantId, T2.DESCRIPTION as deptName, T2.DESCRIPTION2 as deptName2, T2.TITLE as title, T2.TITLE2 as title2, T1.REGDATE as regDate, T1.DEPTID as deptId, T1.JOBID as jobId, T1.ROLEID as roleId, T2.ROLENAME as roleName, T2.ROLENAME2 as roleName2, T1.SUBDEPTYN as subDeptYn FROM TBL_NOTI_EMERGENCY_PERMISSION T1 INNER JOIN ((SELECT D.CN, D.COMPANY, D.DESCRIPTION, D.DISPLAYNAME, D.TITLE, D.COMPANY2, D.DESCRIPTION2, D.DISPLAYNAME2, D.TITLE2, D.DEPARTMENT as DEPTID, D.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME as COMPANYID, D.TENANT_ID, D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 as JOBID, D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 as ROLEID, D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 as ROLENAME, D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 as ROLENAME2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER D WHERE D.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND D.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#)
UNION ALL
(SELECT B.CN, C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 as COMPANY, C.DISPLAYNAME as DESCRIPTION, B.DISPLAYNAME, A2.TITLE, C.COMPNM2 as COMPANY2, C.DISPLAYNAME2 as DESCRIPTION2, B.DISPLAYNAME2, A2.TITLE2, A2.DEPTID, C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 as COMPANYID, A2.TENANT_ID, CAST(A2.JOBID AS NVARCHAR2(200)) as JOBID, CAST(A2.ROLEID AS NVARCHAR2(200)) as ROLEID, A2.ROLE as ROLENAME, A2.ROLE2 as ROLENAME2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER B INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A2 ON A2.CN = B.CN AND A2.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER C ON A2.DEPTID = C.CN AND B.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyId# )) T2 ON T1.CN = T2.CN AND T1.TENANT_ID = T2.TENANT_ID WHERE T1.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND T1.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND T1.DEPTID = T2.DEPTID AND T1.JOBID = T2.JOBID AND T1.ROLEID = T2.ROLEID )
UNION
(SELECT T1.PERMISSION_CODE as permissionCode, T1.CN as cn, DISPLAYNAME as displayName, DISPLAYNAME2 as displayName2, T1.USER_TYPE as userType, NULL as companyId, T1.TENANT_ID as tenantId, NULL as deptName, NULL as deptName2, NULL as title, NULL as title2, T1.REGDATE as regDate, T1.DEPTID as deptId, T1.JOBID as jobId, T1.ROLEID as roleId, NULL as ROLENAME, NULL as ROLENAME2, T1.SUBDEPTYN as subDeptYn FROM TBL_NOTI_EMERGENCY_PERMISSION T1 JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER T3 ON T1.TENANT_ID = T3.TENANT_ID AND T1.CN = T3.CN WHERE T1.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND T1.COMPANY_ID = #companyId#)
UNION
(SELECT T1.PERMISSION_CODE as permissionCode, T1.CN as cn, GROUP_NAME as displayName, GROUP_NAME as displayName2, T1.USER_TYPE as userType, NULL as companyId, T1.TENANT_ID as tenantId, NULL as deptName, NULL as deptName2, NULL as title, NULL as title2, T1.REGDATE as regDate, T1.DEPTID as deptId, T1.JOBID as jobId, T1.ROLEID as roleId, NULL as ROLENAME, NULL as ROLENAME2, T1.SUBDEPTYN as subDeptYn FROM TBL_NOTI_EMERGENCY_PERMISSION T1 JOIN TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPLIST ON T1.TENANT_ID = TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPLIST.TENANT_ID AND T1.CN = TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPLIST.GROUP_ID WHERE T1.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPLIST.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND T1.USER_TYPE = 'GROUP')
UNION
(SELECT T1.PERMISSION_CODE as permissionCode, T1.CN as cn, TBL_USER_JOBMASTER.DISPLAYNAME as displayName, TBL_USER_JOBMASTER.DISPLAYNAME as displayName2, T1.USER_TYPE as userType, NULL as companyId, T1.TENANT_ID as tenantId, NULL as deptName, NULL as deptName2, NULL as title, NULL as title2, T1.REGDATE as regDate, T1.DEPTID as deptId, T1.JOBID as jobId, T1.ROLEID as roleId, NULL as ROLENAME, NULL as ROLENAME2, T1.SUBDEPTYN as subDeptYn FROM TBL_NOTI_EMERGENCY_PERMISSION T1 JOIN TBL_USER_JOBMASTER ON T1.TENANT_ID = TBL_USER_JOBMASTER.TENANT_ID AND T1.CN = TBL_USER_JOBMASTER.JOBID WHERE T1.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND TBL_USER_JOBMASTER.COMPANYID = #companyId# AND (T1.USER_TYPE = 'JIKWI' OR T1.USER_TYPE = 'JIKCHEK') )
ORDER BY REGDATE DESC

SELECT PERMISSION_CODE FROM TBL_NOTI_EMERGENCY_PERMISSION WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
AND CN = #cn# AND DEPTID = #deptId# AND JOBID = #jobId# AND ROLEID = #roleId#
AND CN = #cn#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_NOTI_EMERGENCY_PERMISSION (PERMISSION_CODE, CN, DEPTID, JOBID, ROLEID, USER_TYPE, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, REGDATE, SUBDEPTYN) VALUES ((SELECT NVL(MAX(PERMISSION_CODE) + 1, 1) FROM TBL_NOTI_EMERGENCY_PERMISSION WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#), #cn#, #deptId#, #jobId#, #roleId#, #userType#, #companyId#, #tenantId#, TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #subDeptYn#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_NOTI_EMERGENCY_PERMISSION SET REGDATE = TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), SUBDEPTYN = #subDeptYn# WHERE PERMISSION_CODE = #permissionCode# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_NOTI_EMERGENCY_PERMISSION WHERE PERMISSION_CODE = #permissionCode# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT EMERGENCY_CONTENT FROM TBL_NOTI_EMERGENCY_COMPANY WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.insert: MERGE INTO TBL_NOTI_EMERGENCY_COMPANY tgt USING ( SELECT #companyId# AS COMPANY_ID, #tenantId# AS TENANT_ID, #emergencyContent# AS EMERGENCY_CONTENT, #writerId# AS WRITERID, TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS WRITEDATE FROM dual ) src ON (tgt.COMPANY_ID = src.COMPANY_ID AND tgt.TENANT_ID = src.TENANT_ID) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET tgt.EMERGENCY_CONTENT = src.EMERGENCY_CONTENT, tgt.WRITERID = src.WRITERID, tgt.WRITEDATE = src.WRITEDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, EMERGENCY_CONTENT, WRITERID, WRITEDATE) VALUES (src.COMPANY_ID, src.TENANT_ID, src.EMERGENCY_CONTENT, src.WRITERID, src.WRITEDATE)
sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM
((SELECT D.CN, D.COMPANY, D.DESCRIPTION, D.DISPLAYNAME, D.TITLE, D.COMPANY2, D.DESCRIPTION2, D.DISPLAYNAME2, D.TITLE2, D.DEPARTMENT as DEPTID, D.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME as COMPANYID, D.TENANT_ID, D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7 as JOBID, D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8 as ROLEID, D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10 as ROLENAME, D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE102 as ROLENAME2, D.TENANT_ID as TENANTID FROM TBL_USERMASTER D WHERE D.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND D.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#)
UNION ALL
(SELECT B.CN, C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 as COMPANY, C.DISPLAYNAME as DESCRIPTION, B.DISPLAYNAME, A2.TITLE, C.COMPNM2 as COMPANY2, C.DISPLAYNAME2 as DESCRIPTION2, B.DISPLAYNAME2, A2.TITLE2, A2.DEPTID, C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 as COMPANYID, A2.TENANT_ID, CAST(A2.JOBID as NVARCHAR2(200)) as JOBID, CAST(A2.ROLEID as NVARCHAR2(200)) as ROLEID, A2.ROLE as ROLENAME, A2.ROLE2 as ROLENAME2, A2.TENANT_ID as TENANTID FROM TBL_USERMASTER B INNER JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A2 ON A2.CN = B.CN AND A2.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER C ON A2.DEPTID = C.CN AND B.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyId# )) T1 INNER JOIN TBL_NOTI_EMERGENCY_PERMISSION T2 ON T1.CN = T2.CN AND T1.TENANTID = T2.TENANT_ID AND T1.DEPTID = T2.DEPTID AND T1.ROLEID = T2.ROLEID AND T1.JOBID = T2.JOBID AND T1.COMPANYID = T2.COMPANY_ID WHERE T1.CN = #userId# AND T1.DEPTID = #deptId# AND T1.JOBID = #jobId# AND T1.ROLEID = #roleId# AND T1.TENANTID = #tenantId# AND T1.COMPANYID = #companyId#
TBL_NOTI_EMERGENCY_PERMISSION WHERE USER_TYPE = #userType# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND ( (CN = #deptId# AND SUBDEPTYN = 'N') OR (
#deptPathList[]#
AND SUBDEPTYN = 'Y') )
TBL_NOTI_EMERGENCY_PERMISSION WHERE CN = #jobId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND USER_TYPE = #userType#
TBL_NOTI_EMERGENCY_PERMISSION WHERE CN = #roleId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND USER_TYPE = #userType#

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT A.CN, A.COMPANY_ID, A.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_NOTI_EMERGENCY_PERMISSION A INNER JOIN TBL_PERMISSIONGROUPINFO B ON A.CN = B.GROUP_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANY_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.USER_TYPE = 'GROUP' AND ( (B.MEMBER_ID = #userId# AND B.MEMBER_TYPE = 'USER') OR ( B.MEMBER_ID = #deptId# AND B.MEMBER_TYPE = 'DEPT' AND B.SUB_DEPT_YN = 'N' ) OR (
#deptPathList[]#
AND B.SUB_DEPT_YN = 'Y' ) ) ) C

(SELECT A.CN AS CN, B.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS COMPANYID FROM TBL_USERMASTER A INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER B ON A.DEPARTMENT = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
AND B.CN = #cn#
AND (B.DEPT_CD_PATH LIKE #cn# || ',%' OR B.DEPT_CD_PATH = #cn# OR B.DEPT_CD_PATH LIKE '%,' || #cn# || ',%')
) UNION ( SELECT C.CN AS CN, D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS COMPANYID FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER C INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER D ON C.DEPTID = D.CN AND C.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID WHERE C.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
AND D.CN = #cn#
AND (D.DEPT_CD_PATH LIKE #cn# || ',%' OR D.DEPT_CD_PATH = #cn# OR D.DEPT_CD_PATH LIKE '%,' || #cn# || ',%')
)
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO TBL_NOTI_EMERGENCY_ITEM (NOTIID, WRITERID, NOTITITLE, NOTIBODY, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, WRITEDATE) VALUES ((SELECT NVL(MAX(NOTIID) + 1, 0) as notiId FROM TBL_NOTI_EMERGENCY_ITEM WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#), #writerId#, #notiTitle#, #notiBody#, #companyId#, #tenantId#, TO_DATE(#nowDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'))
SELECT NVL(MAX(NOTIID), 0) as notiId FROM TBL_NOTI_EMERGENCY_ITEM WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT A.NOTIID as notiId, A.WRITERID as writerId, A.TENANT_ID as tenantId, A.NOTITITLE as notiTitle, A.NOTIBODY as notiBody, TO_CHAR((A.WRITEDATE + #offSet# / (24 * 60)), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS writeDate, B.DISPLAYNAME as writerName, B.DISPLAYNAME2 as writerName2, C.DISPLAYNAME as writerDeptName, C.DISPLAYNAME2 as writerDeptName2, B.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 as writerPhoto FROM TBL_NOTI_EMERGENCY_ITEM A INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.WRITERID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER C ON B.DEPARTMENT = C.CN AND B.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID WHERE A.NOTIID = #emergencyItemId# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_NOTI_EMERGENCY_ITEM WHERE NOTIID = #notiId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN = #cn# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
